description: Treats x- prefixed fields as extensions. Unknown x- fields MUST NOT change the meaning of core fields for conformance purposes.
notes: These fixtures test the acceptance side of OBI-T-03: that a tool processes documents containing x- extension fields without refusing them. The 'MUST NOT change the meaning of core fields' clause is not directly testable in this single-document format because verifying it would require comparing tool behavior with and without x- fields present (a comparative test out of scope for this fixture shape). Acceptance tests below establish the necessary baseline; the no-meaning-change clause is a per-tool behavioral guarantee best verified through the SDK's own implementation tests.

tests.description: document with x- extension at the root level
document with x- extensions on operation, binding, and source
document with x- field whose key resembles a core field name

x-operations.spurious: should be ignored as extension, not interpreted as the operations map

tests.description: x- extension nested deeply inside an operation
